task: Quiero aprender a crear una tienda online con WordPress. Encuentra Escuela Emprende, revisa sus cursos de WooCommerce, y matricúlame.

findings: The homepage title is truncated and vague: 'Curso de Inteligencia Artificial, WordPress, Academias...' — doesn't clearly communicate what the school offers
Meta description not clearly visible in HTML — AI agent gets limited context from search results
Organization schema exists but lacks detail (no courses, no pricing, no service descriptions)
Site IS indexable and has a sitemap — basic discoverability infrastructure exists
An AI agent searching for 'cursos WordPress WooCommerce' would need to land on the site to understand the offering

service_comprehension.note: AI can identify 25+ courses across AI, WordPress, ecommerce, marketing. Course categories are clear in HTML navigation.

pricing_clarity.note: Prices NOT visible on homepage or /cursos/. Must navigate to /todos/ to see: Pack Todos €737, Pack+Webs €997, Web 72h €1,837. An AI agent would not find prices without navigating deep.

reputation_access.note: Founder Gonzalo de la Campa is mentioned as author. YouTube stats referenced. But no testimonials or reviews accessible in HTML.

business_identity.note: Name, founder, social profiles, and positioning clearly extractable from HTML and structured data.

structured_data_quality.note: Organization and Website schema present but NO Course schema, NO Product schema, NO pricing in structured data. Major gap — search engines and AI get minimal machine-readable course info.

primary_action_channel.note: WooCommerce cart exists (/carro/) and add-to-cart buttons work on /todos/. But reaching the purchase page requires navigating through multiple levels. No direct 'buy' CTA on homepage.

contact_information.note: WhatsApp link available ('Asesoría Gratis' button). Contact page exists. But no email or phone visible in HTML on main pages.

form_accessibility.note: ConvertPro popup forms detected — these are modal overlays that may not be accessible to AI agents reading static HTML. Contact form exists but popup-dependent.

action_context.note: The 'Ver descuento' buttons on courses provide some guidance, but the path from 'I want to learn WooCommerce' to 'here's the checkout' requires 3+ clicks with no clear funnel.

completion_path.note: Path exists: Homepage → Cursos → Select course → /todos/ → Add to cart → Checkout. But it's not linear, prices are hidden until /todos/, and popups may interrupt.

overall.grade_label: Partial — significant gaps for AI agents
overall.headline: An AI agent can understand what Escuela Emprende offers, but struggles to find prices and complete enrollment without human-like navigation.
